00027 #ifndef JELATINE_INTERPRETER_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_INTERPRETER_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 
00032 #include "method.h"
00033 
00034 /******************************************************************************
00035  * Macros                                                                     *
00036  ******************************************************************************/
00037 
00041 #if JEL_PRINT
00042 #   define PRINT_OPCODE() print_bytecode(thread, pc, fp->method->cp)
00043 #else
00044 #   define PRINT_OPCODE()
00045 #endif // JEL_PRINT
00046 
00052 #if JEL_THREADED_INTERPRETER
00053 #   define INTERPRETER_PROLOG \
00054 goto *dispatch[*pc];
00055 #else
00056 #   define INTERPRETER_PROLOG \
00057 dispatch:\
00058     switch (*pc) {
00059 #endif // JEL_THREADED_INTERPRETER
00060 
00064 #if JEL_THREADED_INTERPRETER
00065 #   define INTERPRETER_EPILOG \
00066 return;
00067 #else
00068 #   define INTERPRETER_EPILOG \
00069     }\
00070 \
00071 return;
00072 #endif // JEL_THREADED_INTERPRETER
00073 
00077 #if JEL_THREADED_INTERPRETER
00078 #   define OPCODE(x) x##_label: \
00079     PRINT_OPCODE();
00080 #else
00081 #   define OPCODE(x) case x: \
00082     PRINT_OPCODE();
00083 #endif // JEL_THREADED_INTERPRETER
00084 
00089 #if JEL_THREADED_INTERPRETER
00090 #   define DISPATCH goto *dispatch[*pc]
00091 #else
00092 #   define DISPATCH goto dispatch
00093 #endif // JEL_THREADED_INTERPRETER
00094 
00095 /******************************************************************************
00096  * Function prototypes                                                        *
00097  ******************************************************************************/
00098 
00099 extern void interpreter(method_t *);
00100 
00101 #endif // !JELATINE_INTERPRETER_H
